title: Using Guidepad.io to Primitives to Simplify Future Facing Problems

resources.title: S3 Provider Service Demo
resources.evidence_quote: It is called s three provider, and it is 105 lines long.

resources.title: CloudTrail Requirement Class
resources.evidence_quote: Inside of our plugin, we have requirements dot py. In this, we define a new class which extend requirement called CloudTrail requirement.

resources.title: Terraform Control Plane Implementation
resources.evidence_quote: If we pop open Terraform, we will see the code. Now all this does is give Guidepad enough information to tell it how to execute Terraform programs.
